question: Will US Average Gas Prices rise or fall 10 cents in one day in May 2026?
textDescription:
Resolves yes if the difference between these two numbers(Current Avg v Yesterday Avg for Regular) is 10.0 cents or greater on any day between market creation and May 31 2026.

https://gasprices.aaa.com/

A rise OR fall will count

The last day will be when prices are updated  to say price as of 5/31/26

[image]
newsShortReason: Recent data indicates significant daily fluctuations in U.S.
newsKeyEvidence: On May 4, 2026, the national average gas price was $4.457 per gallon, rising to $4.558 by May 7, 2026, a 10-cent increase over three days. ([politifact.com](https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2026/may/08/donald-trump/gasoline-prices-falling-crude-oil/?utm_source=openai)) | Between May 4 and May 18, 2026, the national average gas price increased from $4.452 to $4.490 per gallon, a 3.8-cent rise over two weeks. ([eia.gov](https://www.eia.gov/petroleum/gasdiesel/?os=___&utm_source=openai)) | In Metro Detroit, gas prices surged nearly 66 cents in one week, from $4.17 to $4.82 per gallon, highlighting significant daily price changes. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/local/detroit/2026/05/05/metro-detroit-gas-prices-average-iran?utm_source=openai))
